en_title: Mario Kart World 'Forgotten,' as Nintendo Switch 2 Launch Title Goes a Year Without Major DLC
cn_title: 《任天堂》《Nintendo Switch 2》《马力欧卡丁车世界》遭冷落，Switch 2首发一年无大型DLC
subtitle: 玩家怒了
opus_summary: 任天堂直面会公布《咚奇刚：蕉力全开》和《宝可梦Pokopia》DLC，却对《马力欧卡丁车世界》只字未提。玩家不满，认为装机量最大的Switch 2首发游戏被忽视，呼吁添加新赛道、角色或挑战。

paragraphs.en: Nintendo fans have reacted in despair at the lack of updates to Mario Kart World , following this week's big Nintendo Direct broadcast .
paragraphs.cn: 本周任天堂直面会结束后，任天堂粉丝对《马力欧卡丁车世界》缺乏更新感到绝望。

paragraphs.en: While DLC and expansions were confirmed for other hit Switch 2 games, such as Donkey Kong Bananza and Pokémon Pokopia, Nintendo once again kept schtum about any plans to add content to the platform's best-selling title.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管其他热门Switch 2游戏如《咚奇刚 蕉力全开》和《宝可梦Pokopia》已确认推出DLC和扩展内容，但任天堂再次对为该平台最畅销作品添加内容的计划保持沉默。

paragraphs.en: Of course, many fans bought Mario Kart World in a bundle with their console — but owners say that this is the perfect reason why Nintendo should be prioritizing the game with fresh content. After all, it has the biggest install base of any title on Switch 2 — and for many, it could do with sprucing up, to counter claims that its open world is a bit dull.
paragraphs.cn: 当然，许多玩家是随主机捆绑购买了《马力欧卡丁车世界》——但玩家们表示，这恰恰是任天堂应该优先为该游戏提供新内容的理由。毕竟，它是Switch 2上装机量最大的游戏——对许多人来说，它需要一些改进，以反驳其开放世界略显乏味的说法。

paragraphs.en: "Nintendo took our Switch 2 bundle and $80 and went home," wrote Yoshimitsu126, in a ResetEra forum thread discussing the lack of Mario Kart World updates. "And now are wondering wtf to do with the open world if they add new tracks. While DK and Pokopia have DLC announced with a few months after they got released."
paragraphs.cn: 「任天堂拿了我们的Switch 2捆绑包和80美元(约合人民币573元)就回家了，」Yoshimitsu126在ResetEra论坛讨论《马力欧卡丁车世界》缺乏更新的帖子中写道，「现在他们还在想，如果添加新赛道，该怎么处理开放世界。而咚奇刚和宝可梦的游戏在发售后几个月就宣布了DLC。」

paragraphs.en: "I do think Nintendo at this point are getting a bit complacent and cocky," wrote RowGonsoleConsole in a similar lengthy thread on reddit , titled 'No DLC Announcement For MKW Nintendo Hates Us And Mario Kart.' "World 100% needed DLC more than Bananza did but yet I feel like I've seen new news about Bananza every five seconds."
paragraphs.cn: 「我确实认为任天堂现在有点自满和傲慢了，」RowGonsoleConsole在Reddit上一个类似的冗长帖子中写道，标题是「MKW没有DLC公告，任天堂恨我们和马力欧卡丁车」。「《世界》100%比《蕉力全开》更需要DLC，但我感觉每五秒钟就能看到《蕉力全开》的新消息。」

paragraphs.en: "It's crazy to me that Donkey Kong Bananza (a single-player game that carried no expectations of ongoing support) has had more regular content drops than MKW," added Axe. "You'd think they'd want to leverage this open world as much as possible by regularly adding new challenges, vehicles, and whatever... but I guess not. I don't even particularly care about having a big DLC with new tracks. Just having a new costume option for DK or Pauline would be nice, at the very least."
paragraphs.cn: 「《咚奇刚 蕉力全开》（一款没有持续支持预期的单人游戏）比MKW有更频繁的内容更新，这让我觉得疯狂，」Axe补充道。「你会以为他们想通过定期添加新挑战、新车辆等来尽可能利用这个开放世界……但看来并没有。我甚至不太在意有没有包含新赛道的大型DLC。至少给咚奇刚或宝琳加个新服装选项也不错。」

paragraphs.en: While some fans have questioned how Nintendo will add new tracks to its existing Mario Kart World map, others have suggested that all the company need do is add in additional racers, costumes or challenges to keep the game feeling fresh. With it owned by so many Switch 2 purchasers, surely this would be the perfect solution to keep fans coming back to the console?
paragraphs.cn: 虽然一些玩家质疑任天堂将如何在现有的《马力欧卡丁车世界》地图中添加新赛道，但另一些人建议，公司只需增加额外的赛车手、服装或挑战，就能让游戏保持新鲜感。既然这么多Switch 2购买者都拥有这款游戏，这无疑是让玩家回归主机的完美解决方案，不是吗？

paragraphs.en: "Classic Grand Prix as an option, multiplayer free roam, user-created point A to point B races in the world," suggested gary!. "Being really bold - add in a Diddy Kong Racing-like basic story that progresses you through the world and add simple boss events/races which would also carry over to multiplayer modes. All of that seems like it could be added to the existing map. Then in another year go ahead and add another map. Go nuts."
paragraphs.cn: 「经典大奖赛模式、多人自由漫游、玩家自创的从A点到B点的赛道，」gary!建议道。「更大胆一点——加入类似《迪迪刚赛车》的基础剧情，让你在开放世界中推进，并添加简单的Boss事件/比赛，这些也可以延续到多人模式。所有这些似乎都可以添加到现有地图中。然后过一年再添加另一张地图。尽情发挥吧。」

paragraphs.en: "MK World needs split screen online progression," wrote OuterWildsVentures. "We still don't play it because Player 2 gets nothing lol"
paragraphs.cn: 「《马力欧卡丁车世界》需要分屏在线进度，」OuterWildsVentures写道。「我们到现在都不玩它，因为2号玩家什么都得不到，哈哈。」

paragraphs.en: Alas, Nintendo has made no mention of major additions to Mario Kart World — paid, or otherwise — beyond the addition of a third battle mode, Bob-omb Blast . Otherwise, all it has done to the game so far is tweak settings and improve a couple of sparse stretches of open world — though fans would like to see much more done. Surely new content will eventually come in time — and it is still early days for Switch 2, with the console now just a year old. Maybe next year?
paragraphs.cn: 唉，任天堂除了添加第三个对战模式「炸弹兵爆破」外，并未提及对《马力欧卡丁车世界》的任何重大更新——无论是付费还是免费。除此之外，到目前为止，他们所做的只是调整设置并改进了开放世界中几处稀疏的区域——尽管玩家希望看到更多内容。当然，新内容最终会适时到来——Switch 2才刚刚上市一年，还处于早期阶段。也许明年？

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。可通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系Tom，或在Bluesky上找到他。
